reviews.author: Rashed Rahman
reviews.text:
I used this detailer in mid-November this year but was busy and only able to post this review now.

I chose this service based on the overwhelming number of 5-star reviews, but my experience was the complete opposite. I paid around $250 to detail my brand-new Honda, and the quality was very disappointing. Both the interior and exterior were poorly cleaned, with visible stains, uneven wiping, and missed areas. I had to spend over an hour cleaning the car myself afterward.

When I contacted the detailer, he did return, but instead of acknowledging the issues, he became confrontational with me and my wife and denied any problems. I also noticed new scratches after the detailing, which he completely dismissed. Based on the results, it seemed low-quality or inappropriate products may have been used.

Overall, a very frustrating experience for the price. I do not recommend this service, and the high online rating does not reflect the work I received.

📸 only a few photos posting showing stains after the service.

reviews.author: Lavon Grant
reviews.text:
Demetric and his team did an awesome job detailing my Audi convertible. I can see it shining before I even got close up to it. I’m so thankful they came out to me and he washed it with great precision.
If you need your car detailed, make sure you reach out to them for service

reviews.author: Kamau Foderingham
reviews.text: Demetric and his colleague did an excellent job, they were able to get to me with same-day service. Customer service was excellent. Very pleasant, helpful, just what I needed. Very professional, very reasonable, would definitely use them again.

reviews.author: Caroline Weimar
reviews.text: I had a great experience with Trushyne Mobile Detailing. I had a last minute urgent need for car detailing and called late on a Sunday afternoon. They were able to come to my house within the hour and did an excellent job. Very professional and thorough. Will use again and recommend to friends.

reviews.author: Paris Rainey
reviews.text: I bought my car on Saturday, Mr. Demetric and Trushyne staff pulled up the next day (Sunday) and did a TERRIFIC job! If you want TOP quality, reliable and efficient service, BOOK THEM today!! I literally can’t stop looking at my new car!!

notes: Captured via Places API on 2026-04-17. Mac Mini direct (Bruce cron stuck).
